arts.ttl: Official | André Ayew rejoins Le Havre
arts.sum: André Ayew (34) has rejoined Ligue 1 side Le Havre AC. The Ghanaian forward had been without a club after his deal with Les Ciel et Marines expired at the end…

arts.ttl: Brest players slept in airport following Champions League victory against Salzburg
arts.sum: According to Le Telegramme, players of Brest were forced to sleep in the airport following their rampant 4-0 victory against RB Salzburg in the Champions League. Following a historic display from…
